startups.name: NeuroSynthetix
startups.description: Enterprise-grade synthetic data generation platform designed for medical and legal compliance. Fine-tuned specialized models that achieve 99.8% semantic accuracy while remaining 100% compliant with privacy regulations.
startups.impact: Generated 50B+ synthetic clinical tokens; reduced model training data cost by 70% for Fortune 500 partners.

startups.name: CognitiveGrid
startups.description: A decentralized grid network enabling edge devices, IoT sensors, and mobile devices to collaboratively run split-inference sub-billion parameter machine learning models in real-time.
startups.impact: Deployed across 12,000+ nodes; reduced latency for local ML executions from 180ms to 12ms.

startups.name: Web3Intelligence
startups.description: Real-time auditing platform merging smart contract event logs with deep learning predictive models to autonomously detect and stop flash-loan attacks and decentralized pool manipulations.
startups.impact: Protected $120M+ TVL (Total Value Locked); flagged 34 zero-day exploits before block execution.

projects.title: AstraNet
projects.description: Deep learning architecture built for galaxy cluster segmentation and noise reduction in low-light celestial imaging. Achieved state-of-the-art segmentation maps on Hubble Deep Field subsets.

projects.title: OmniFlow
projects.description: A high-performance Rust framework compiling web applications to WASM, featuring auto-syncing distributed state machines and immediate reactivity without virtual DOM overhead.

projects.title: SentientEye
projects.description: A real-time compute-constrained computer vision suite deployed on drone microcontrollers for spatial mapping, obstacle avoidance, and optical flow estimation in GPS-denied environments.

projects.title: DevAgent.AI
projects.description: An autonomous AI software engineering agent that parses code directories, writes comprehensive unit tests, resolves build issues, and optimizes slow algorithms completely in the background.

timeline.description: Pioneering distributed edge AI model deployment. Architected the main WebRTC P2P model split-inference protocol. Scaled node enrollment to 12K+ devices globally.
Built customized LLM pipelines for customer service automation. Fine-tuned corporate code assistants. Optimized inference pipelines using TensorRT and vLLM, saving 42% in cloud computing bills.
Developed dynamic React dashboard interfaces coupled with Python microservices. Built real-time classification engines for genomic sequencing datasets. Scaled Kubernetes clusters.
Specialized in Deep Learning and Computer Vision. Researched multi-modal fusion networks. Published 3 papers in CVPR and NeurIPS workshops.
Graduated with honors. Solid foundation in Algorithms, Operating Systems, Database Management Systems, and Machine Learning theory.
